findingDetails.title: Parent spec Phase 2 status 'Draft' but child spec reports 'Complete'
findingDetails.evidence: Parent Phase Documentation Map shows 002 as Draft, but 002/spec.md:39 declares Status: Complete and 002/implementation-summary.md confirms implementation delivered

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 spec.md status says 'Draft' but implementation is shipped
findingDetails.evidence: spec.md frontmatter Status: Draft vs impl-summary.md Status: Active with evidence files

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 checklist all items unchecked (0/21) despite evidence captured

findingDetails.title: Phase 002 checklist _memory.continuity.completion_pct:0 but impl-summary completion_pct:100
findingDetails.evidence: checklist.md frontmatter shows completion_pct: 0 vs impl-summary shows 100

findingDetails.title: Parent 003→004 handoff table doesn't reflect SD-019 dispatch gap surfaced by Phase 4
